title: DFAPTI Candidate Target
description: An entity surfaced by the target discovery layer. Candidates are internal-only (never linked from the public dashboard) until the Target Visibility Gate promotes them to a full case — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.

name.description: Entity/company name as it appears in the source document. Never a guess — must come from the fetched or independently-searched text.

verified.description: True only if this specific URL has been independently confirmed (direct fetch+hash, or cross-referenced search corroboration) to be a real primary source that directly supports a specific claim naming this entity — the same bar as evidence-schema.json ACCEPTED. Not merely 'found by a keyword match.'

risk_indicators.description: Neutral, source-grounded descriptions only (e.g. 'named as respondent in ASIC proceedings X'), never characterisations of guilt, intent, or wrongdoing.
